message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting across codebase

Automated rustfmt pass covering 13 files. No behavioral changes.

Key formatting improvements:
- Break long method chains and function signatures across lines
  (io_driver.rs, server.rs, pool.rs, three_lane.rs)
- Expand single-line if-let blocks to multi-line for readability
  (tcp/split.rs, unix/split.rs)
- Normalize trailing whitespace (websocket/client.rs,
  websocket/server.rs, mutex.rs, scope.rs)
- Sort imports alphabetically (tests/lost_wakeup_bug.rs)
- Remove spurious blank line (wheel.rs)
- Break long string literal (client.rs test)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
